{{CargoRelic
|name=The Gilded Age
|class_id=21596
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This novel, written by Mark Twain, exposes the social issues of late 19th-century America. Through the story of the Hawkins family, it portrays characters from both the West and the East, metaphorically reflecting the speculative enthusiasm and pursuit of wealth in American society at the time. The author satirizes political corruption, commercial fraud, and the decline of social morals, carrying profound social symbolic significance. The book not only reflects the dark side of capitalism after the Civil War but also expresses a deep reflection on the democratic system. The satire and humor in the novel make it a work with a strong critical spirit while exposing social problems.
|fame=69
|art=66
|fth=62
|civ=108
|tech=57
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
